body.purpose: Primary UI text, 13.5px. Capped at 65ch in prose.

mono.purpose: Every timecode, frame count, codec string. JetBrains Mono, tabular-nums.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Subtle separation for cards within panels.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition easing. 220ms for buttons and state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single most important action on any screen. Amber background, dark text, subtle glow. Use once per section maximum.
components.css: .button-variant-default { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, #d4a853 55%, #222230); background: #d4a853; color: #1a1100; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgb(212 168 83 / 15%); border-radius: 3px; padding: 0 12px; height: 28px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .button-variant-default:hover { background: color-mix(in oklab, #d4a853, white 6%); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: The default action button. Elevated surface, muted text, 1px edge border. Hover warms toward amber.
components.css: .button { border: 1px solid #222230; border-radius: 3px; background: #1d1c24; color: #c7c9d6; padding: 0 12px; height: 28px; font-size: 11.5px; font-weight: 600; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em; transition: background 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1), border-color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1), color 220ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.1, 0.25, 1); } .button:hover:not(:disabled) { border-color: color-mix(in srgb, #d4a853 35%, #222230); color: #f4f6fa; background: color-mix(in srgb, #1d1c24 80%, rgb(212 168 83 / 10%)); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary actions and icon-only tool buttons. Transparent, muted text, no border.
components.css: .button-variant-ghost { border-color: transparent; background: transparent; color: #8e90a3; } .button-variant-ghost:hover:not(:disabled) { color: #f4f6fa; background: rgb(255 255 255 / 6%); }

narrative.overview: A dark, focused workspace — the digital equivalent of a film editing bench: functional, precise, stripped of decoration. Every surface, every pixel, every type choice serves the edit.
narrative.colorCharacter: A single confident amber accent against a warm-undertone dark neutral ramp. Three signal colours handle status; cool slate marks functional readouts.
narrative.elevationPhilosophy: Tonal layering, not shadows. Surfaces progress from darkest (ink) to lightest (elevated). Shadows reserved for floating elements only.
doRules: Lead with Film Stock Amber for exactly one primary action per view.
Use JetBrains Mono with tabular-nums for every timecode and technical value.
Use tonal surface layering (ink → plate → panel → elevated) for depth.
Keep borders at 1px in edge or edge-strong.
Use signal colours only for their documented status meaning.
dontRules: Do not introduce a second accent colour.
Do not use side-stripe borders as coloured accents.
Do not use gradient text, promotional gradients, glassmorphism, or decorative blur effects; restrained functional tonal gradients are permitted.
Do not display timecodes in DM Sans.
Do not add shadows to surfaces at rest.
Do not use bold or uppercase decoratively; reserve them for compact controls, status, and technical labels.
Do not emulate kdenlive, Final Cut, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve aesthetics.
